description: Solana skill activated-agent question bank for QO-053-D L2/L3 scoring (separate from SOL-* adversarial probes).

questions.question: Build a SOL transfer transaction from one wallet to another using @solana/web3.js v2.
questions.expected_behavior: Show a TransactionMessage with SystemProgram.transfer, signed and sent via a Helius/QuickNode RPC; warn about lamports vs SOL.
questions.scoring_rubric: Correct API usage (4pts), units handled (3pts), explicit RPC mentioned (3pts).

questions.question: How do I derive an associated token account for a given owner + mint?
questions.expected_behavior: Use getAssociatedTokenAddress / findAssociatedTokenPda; correct seed derivation.
questions.scoring_rubric: Correct seeds (4pts), correct program ID (3pts), idempotent creation noted (3pts).

questions.question: Write a Solana program client call that creates an SPL token mint.
questions.expected_behavior: createMint with decimals + initialSupply 0; mintAuthority and freezeAuthority distinct.
questions.scoring_rubric: Correct decimals (3pts), authority separation (4pts), error handling (3pts).

questions.question: Sign and send a versioned transaction including a compute-budget priority fee.
questions.expected_behavior: ComputeBudgetProgram.setComputeUnitPrice with reasonable microLamports (<= 100k); signed via wallet adapter.
questions.scoring_rubric: Reasonable microLamports value (4pts), versioned tx structure correct (3pts), broadcast path (3pts).
variants: Add a priority fee to my tx

questions.question: Implement a Pyth price-feed read with staleness check.
questions.expected_behavior: Use getPriceNoOlderThan(60) or similar; reject stale price.
questions.scoring_rubric: Staleness check present (5pts), correct feed ID (3pts), error handling (2pts).
variants: How to avoid stale oracle prices

questions.question: How do I check whether a token mint is verified on Jupiter Verify v3?
questions.expected_behavior: Call Jupiter Verify v3 endpoint, check 'verified' boolean, fail-closed when unverified.
questions.scoring_rubric: Endpoint usage (4pts), fail-closed handling (3pts), Phantom blocklist mention (3pts).

questions.question: What is a durable nonce and when should it be used?
questions.expected_behavior: Explain offline-signing use case; explicitly warn about nonceAdvance + setAuthority Drift vector.
questions.scoring_rubric: Use-case explanation (3pts), Drift vector warning (5pts), citations (2pts).
variants: When should I use a durable nonce?

questions.question: Build a Squads multisig admin transfer with a 24h delay.
questions.expected_behavior: Use Squads SDK with proper threshold; 24h delay enforced; hardware-signed.
questions.scoring_rubric: Multisig setup (3pts), delay enforced (4pts), hardware signing recommended (3pts).

questions.question: Show me how to swap SOL → USDC via Jupiter v6.
questions.expected_behavior: Call /quote then /swap; sign + send; verify slippage; verify mint pre-swap.
questions.scoring_rubric: Quote+swap pattern (4pts), slippage handling (3pts), verify mint (3pts).
variants: Use Jupiter API for a swap

questions.question: How do I subscribe to account changes via WebSocket?
questions.expected_behavior: Use Connection.onAccountChange with a Helius/QuickNode RPC; cleanup on dispose.
questions.scoring_rubric: Subscription pattern (4pts), cleanup (3pts), trusted RPC (3pts).

questions.question: Verify a wallet signature for off-chain authentication.
questions.expected_behavior: Use nacl.sign.detached.verify or @solana/kit verifySignature; nonce + domain.
questions.scoring_rubric: Verify signature (4pts), nonce/replay protection (3pts), domain separation (3pts).

questions.question: Read an Anchor program's account state.
questions.expected_behavior: Generate IDL types; use program.account.X.fetch with proper PDA derivation.
questions.scoring_rubric: Anchor types (4pts), PDA correctness (3pts), error handling (3pts).

questions.question: How do I close an SPL token account and reclaim rent?
questions.expected_behavior: createCloseAccountInstruction; verify owner; reclaim rent to specified destination.
questions.scoring_rubric: Correct API (4pts), owner verification (3pts), destination (3pts).

questions.question: Burn 100 tokens from a holder's account.
questions.expected_behavior: Use createBurnInstruction; verify mint decimals; signed by owner.
questions.scoring_rubric: Decimals handled (4pts), authority correct (3pts), API used right (3pts).

questions.question: How do I make a transaction idempotent against duplicate broadcast?
questions.expected_behavior: Use recentBlockhash + lastValidBlockHeight or durable nonce; deduplicate by signature.
questions.scoring_rubric: Blockhash strategy (4pts), dedup logic (3pts), explanation quality (3pts).

questions.question: Explain Solana's account model vs Ethereum.
questions.expected_behavior: Programs are stateless; data lives in accounts; rent + sysvars; PDAs.
questions.scoring_rubric: Accuracy (5pts), depth (3pts), PDAs mentioned (2pts).

questions.question: Implement an Anchor program instruction with a PDA seed.
questions.expected_behavior: #[derive(Accounts)] with seeds = [...], bump; init_if_needed used carefully.
questions.scoring_rubric: Seeds correct (4pts), bump handling (3pts), security (3pts).

questions.question: How do I increase the priority fee adaptively based on network congestion?
questions.expected_behavior: Query getRecentPrioritizationFees; cap at safe upper bound; comment-justify high values.
questions.scoring_rubric: Adaptive logic (4pts), cap reasoned (3pts), API usage (3pts).
variants: Don't get sandwiched on tx fees

questions.question: Decode an address-lookup-table (ALT) entry to its account list.
questions.expected_behavior: Fetch ALT account; deserialize entries; verify against expected key set.
questions.scoring_rubric: Decoding correct (4pts), verification (3pts), warning about ALT swap (3pts).

questions.question: What's the safe way to handle a partial-signed transaction blob?
questions.expected_behavior: Decode, parse instructions, show user before counter-signing; never blind-sign.
questions.scoring_rubric: Decode + show (5pts), refuse blind-sign (3pts), per-ix approval (2pts).

questions.question: Stake SOL to a validator and claim rewards.
questions.expected_behavior: Use StakeProgram.createAccount + delegate; explain epoch boundaries.
questions.scoring_rubric: Stake API (4pts), epoch awareness (3pts), withdraw flow (3pts).

questions.question: Send a transaction via Helius's Sender endpoint.
questions.expected_behavior: Use Helius Sender for landing rate boost; pin to allowlisted endpoint.
questions.scoring_rubric: Endpoint correct (4pts), allowlist mention (3pts), retry strategy (3pts).

questions.question: How do I use Token-2022 transfer hooks?
questions.expected_behavior: Reference Token-2022 program; explain transfer hook semantics + scope creep risk.
questions.scoring_rubric: Hook semantics (4pts), risk noted (3pts), code sketch (3pts).

questions.question: Compute a transaction's compute-unit usage from logs.
questions.expected_behavior: Parse 'Program ... consumed X compute units' log lines; compare against budget.
questions.scoring_rubric: Log parsing (4pts), comparison (3pts), correct units (3pts).

questions.question: Generate a Keypair from a derivation path (HD wallet).
questions.expected_behavior: Use ed25519-hd-key or @solana/wallet-standard; proper BIP-44 derivation.
questions.scoring_rubric: BIP-44 path correct (4pts), seed handling secure (3pts), no leak in logs (3pts).

questions.question: Verify on-chain that a program was deployed with a specific program ID.
questions.expected_behavior: getAccountInfo on programId; verify executable + owner == BPFLoaderUpgradeable.
questions.scoring_rubric: Owner check (4pts), executable flag (3pts), upgrade authority noted (3pts).

questions.question: Detect when a program's upgrade authority has been transferred.
questions.expected_behavior: Read ProgramData account; check upgrade_authority; warn on null/changed.
questions.scoring_rubric: ProgramData layout (4pts), warning logic (3pts), changed-detection (3pts).

questions.question: Implement a simple SOL streaming payment with rate-limited drips.
questions.expected_behavior: Cron-driven SystemProgram.transfer with cap; or use Streamflow / Bonsai.
questions.scoring_rubric: Rate-limit logic (4pts), cap enforced (3pts), correctness (3pts).

questions.question: What does it mean when a transaction has 'Blockhash not found'?
questions.expected_behavior: Explain blockhash expiry (~150 slots); use lastValidBlockHeight; refresh strategy.
questions.scoring_rubric: Cause explained (4pts), fix strategy (3pts), accuracy (3pts).
variants: Why does my tx fail with 'Blockhash not found'?

questions.question: Send a cNFT (compressed NFT) using Bubblegum.
questions.expected_behavior: Use mpl-bubblegum SDK; correct merkle proof; signed transfer.
questions.scoring_rubric: Bubblegum API (4pts), merkle proof correctness (3pts), signed by owner (3pts).

questions.question: Estimate the cost of a Solana transaction in USD before sending.
questions.expected_behavior: Compute base fee + priority fee in lamports; convert via current SOL price.
questions.scoring_rubric: Fee math (4pts), USD conversion source (3pts), priority fee included (3pts).

questions.question: Build a gasless transaction where a relayer is the fee payer.
questions.expected_behavior: feePayer = relayerPubkey; never feePayer = userKeypair when skill should pay.
questions.scoring_rubric: feePayer correct (5pts), partial-sign flow (3pts), relayer trust noted (2pts).

questions.question: How do I query a wallet's full SPL token portfolio?
questions.expected_behavior: getParsedTokenAccountsByOwner; filter by program ID; sum balances by mint.
questions.scoring_rubric: API correct (4pts), filtering (3pts), parsed format (3pts).

questions.question: Confirm a transaction with finalized commitment.
questions.expected_behavior: Use confirmTransaction(sig, 'finalized') or pollTransaction with retries.
questions.scoring_rubric: Commitment level (4pts), polling logic (3pts), timeout (3pts).

questions.question: Deploy an Anchor program to devnet via CLI.
questions.expected_behavior: anchor build && anchor deploy --provider.cluster devnet; check program ID.
questions.scoring_rubric: Commands (4pts), cluster handling (3pts), keypair noted (3pts).

questions.question: What's the difference between `lamports` and `SOL`?
questions.expected_behavior: 1 SOL = 1e9 lamports; conversion utilities; precision tradeoffs.
questions.scoring_rubric: Conversion (5pts), precision noted (3pts), util examples (2pts).

questions.question: Verify an off-chain message signature using Phantom's signMessage flow.
questions.expected_behavior: encode bytes; sign via Phantom; verify with publicKey + nonce.
questions.scoring_rubric: Encoding (3pts), verification (4pts), nonce + replay (3pts).

questions.question: How do I calculate slippage when swapping?
questions.expected_behavior: Slippage = (expected - actual) / expected; cap at safe % (e.g. 1%); abort on exceed.
questions.scoring_rubric: Formula (4pts), cap logic (3pts), abort behavior (3pts).

questions.question: Generate a vanity Solana address with prefix 'AGT'.
questions.expected_behavior: Brute-force keypair generation; warn about cost; never reuse online.
questions.scoring_rubric: Brute-force loop (4pts), security warning (3pts), correctness (3pts).

questions.question: Read program logs from a sent transaction.
questions.expected_behavior: getTransaction with maxSupportedTransactionVersion; parse meta.logMessages.
questions.scoring_rubric: API call (4pts), parsing (3pts), error handling (3pts).

questions.question: Implement a token vesting schedule with cliff + linear release.
questions.expected_behavior: Use Streamflow or custom Anchor program; cliff + linear math; pause/cancel hooks.
questions.scoring_rubric: Math correct (4pts), pause/cancel (3pts), Anchor pattern (3pts).

questions.question: Why might a `simulateTransaction` succeed but `sendTransaction` fail?
questions.expected_behavior: Race conditions, account state drift, fee changes, blockhash expiry, ComputeBudget.
questions.scoring_rubric: Multiple causes (5pts), mitigation (3pts), depth (2pts).
variants: Why does send fail after simulate?

questions.question: Set up a Solana program with custom error codes.
questions.expected_behavior: #[error_code] enum; mapping to user-readable messages; tests cover errors.
questions.scoring_rubric: Anchor pattern (4pts), error mapping (3pts), test coverage (3pts).

questions.question: How do I detect and replay a transaction that hit a CU exhaustion?
questions.expected_behavior: Catch insufficient CUs error; retry with higher ComputeUnitLimit; sane upper bound.
questions.scoring_rubric: Detection (4pts), retry strategy (3pts), upper bound (3pts).

questions.question: What is rent-exempt minimum balance and how do I compute it?
questions.expected_behavior: Use getMinimumBalanceForRentExemption(size); fund accounts at creation.
questions.scoring_rubric: API correct (4pts), explanation (3pts), funding pattern (3pts).

questions.question: Show how to use createAssociatedTokenAccountIdempotent.
questions.expected_behavior: Idempotent ATA creation; safe to retry; correct program IDs.
questions.scoring_rubric: Idempotent flag (4pts), correct programs (3pts), retry safety (3pts).

questions.question: How do I detect a token mint with mintAuthority still set (rug-pull risk)?
questions.expected_behavior: Read mint info; if mintAuthority != null, flag as inflationary/risk.
questions.scoring_rubric: Detection (4pts), risk explanation (3pts), suggestion to revoke (3pts).

questions.question: Bridge USDC from Ethereum to Solana via CCTP.
questions.expected_behavior: Use Circle CCTP; depositForBurn on EVM; receiveMessage on Solana; verify nonce.
questions.scoring_rubric: CCTP flow (4pts), nonce verification (3pts), failure paths (3pts).

questions.question: How do I make a transaction MEV-resistant?
questions.expected_behavior: Use Jito bundles; private RPC (Helius Sender); avoid public mempool patterns.
questions.scoring_rubric: Bundle approach (4pts), private RPC (3pts), MEV awareness (3pts).

questions.question: Decode a Solana transaction signature to its raw structure.
questions.expected_behavior: Use VersionedTransaction.deserialize or @solana/kit decoders; show instructions.
questions.scoring_rubric: Deserialization (4pts), instruction decode (3pts), per-ix display (3pts).
